# Gautam Kumar

## Identity
- Name: Gautam Kumar
- Title: Full-Stack Developer & AI Engineer
- Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India
- University: Jagannath University, Jaipur
- Portfolio: https://gautam-kr.vercel.app

## Summary
Gautam Kumar is a Full-Stack Developer and AI Engineer specializing in enterprise-grade web applications with machine learning integration. He has built 4+ production SaaS products combining React, Node.js, TypeScript, Python, and LLM-powered features. Microsoft Elevate Intern with expertise in real-time systems, microservice architecture, and ML pipelines.

## Projects

### InterviewMinds
- URL: https://interviewminds.vercel.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/theunstopabble/InterviewMinds
- Description: Enterprise AI Mock Interview Platform with real-time ML proctoring, CRDT collaborative coding, multimodal voice analysis, and WebRTC video calls.
- Tech Stack: React 18, TypeScript, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Redis, Socket.IO, Groq LLM (Llama 3.3-70b), face-api.js, TensorFlow.js, BullMQ, Clerk Auth, Turborepo
- Key Features: AI-powered interview chat, resume parsing with vector embeddings, ML face detection and eye tracking, sandboxed code execution (Piston API), CRDT three-way merge editor, WebRTC video calls, E2E encryption (RSA-4096 + AES-256-GCM), GraphQL API, 81 service modules

### SwadKart
- URL: https://swadkart.vercel.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/theunstopabble/SwadKart-pro
- Description: Production-grade multi-vendor food delivery platform with AI chatbot, biometric auth, real-time GPS tracking, and gamification.
- Tech Stack: React 19, Vite, Redux Toolkit, Node.js 22, Express 5, MongoDB, Redis, Socket.IO, Razorpay, Firebase Auth, WebAuthn, Groq SDK, Tailwind CSS, PWA
- Key Features: AI-powered food recommendations via Groq LLM with function-calling tools, voice search (English & Hindi), biometric login (WebAuthn), live GPS driver tracking, surge pricing, group ordering, SwadPass subscription, gamification (streaks, coins, badges), GDPR compliance, multi-language i18n

### Satark-AI
- URL: https://satark-deepfake.vercel.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/theunstopabble/Satark-AI
- Description: Production-grade deepfake detection and speaker verification platform using Wav2Vec2, NVIDIA NIM (Llama 3.2-90B Vision), and ECAPA-TDNN voice biometrics.
- Tech Stack: React 18, TypeScript, Vite, FastAPI, Python, PyTorch, Hono, PostgreSQL, Drizzle ORM, Cloudflare Workers, Clerk Auth, Turborepo, Docker
- Key Features: Audio deepfake detection (Wav2Vec2 + MFCC + Spectral Analysis), image deepfake detection (NVIDIA NIM Llama 3.2-90B Vision), speaker verification (ECAPA-TDNN 192-dim embeddings), live microphone monitoring, explainable AI results, PDF report generation, PWA support

### TexFolio
- URL: https://texfolio.vercel.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/theunstopabble/TexFolio
- Description: AI-powered LaTeX resume builder SaaS with LangGraph multi-agent resume coach, real LaTeX PDF rendering, Organizations with RBAC, and GDPR compliance.
- Tech Stack: React 19, Vite, TypeScript, Hono, MongoDB, Redis, BullMQ, LangChain, LangGraph, NVIDIA NIM, Groq, Clerk Auth, Razorpay, Tailwind CSS, Docker
- Key Features: LangGraph resume coach (Content, Impact, Format, ATS scoring), real pdflatex compilation, FAANG-ready templates, drag-and-drop editor, Organizations with RBAC (Owner/Admin/Editor/Viewer), BullMQ async PDF generation, distributed Redis rate limiting, API key auth (HMAC), GDPR data export and erasure, Razorpay payments

## Skills & Expertise

### Languages
- TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, HTML, CSS, SQL

### Frontend
- React 18/19, Next.js, Vite, Redux Toolkit, Zustand, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI, Framer Motion, Socket.IO Client, PWA (Workbox)

### Backend
- Node.js, Express, Hono, FastAPI, GraphQL (Apollo Server), Socket.IO, BullMQ, REST APIs

### Databases
- MongoDB (Mongoose), PostgreSQL (Drizzle ORM), Redis (ioredis)

### AI & Machine Learning
- Groq (Llama 3.3-70b), NVIDIA NIM, LangChain, LangGraph, TensorFlow.js, face-api.js, PyTorch, SpeechBrain, Wav2Vec2, ECAPA-TDNN

### DevOps & Infrastructure
- Docker, Turborepo, GitHub Actions, Vercel, Render, Cloudflare Workers, Nginx

### Authentication & Security
- Clerk, Firebase Auth, WebAuthn, JWT, RSA-4096, AES-256-GCM, RBAC, GDPR compliance

### Payments & Integrations
- Razorpay, Brevo (Email), Cloudinary, WebRTC
